features.featureTitle: Regenerate the CSV dataset file at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv with approximately 500 records instead of 2000, maintaining the existing schema with columns: Citizen_ID (12-digit text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY format), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (number). Preserve data variety including different income tiers, multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes, mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5.
